target: Loose-foot bridge buzzes cleanly when bowed without choking the string
method: Bench-rig: bow single tensioned string over interchangeable bridge; observe buzz onset
action: Adjust bridge mass, foot gap, and contact material; re-test

target: Buzz sustains and resets repeatably across bowing gestures
method: Bench-rig repeat trials; log buzz character and reset repeatability

target: String sustains adequately despite loose-foot rattle
method: Compare sustain with/without buzzing foot on bench rig

target: Player can reliably locate natural harmonics
method: Harmonic map derived from selected scale length + tuning; bench check
action: Define scale/tuning first; then place harmonic guides

target: Loose foot and soundboard contact wear acceptably over use
method: Inspect contact patch after repeated bench sessions
action: Select harder contact material / replaceable shim

target: Body/soundboard reinforce sound without uncontrolled rattle
method: Resonance mockup after historical envelope + bridge load path reviewed

target: Sympathetic strings add useful bloom rather than setup complication
method: Resonance mockup A/B with and without sympathetic strings
action: Decide defer vs include in first full-body prototype

target: Reference family + reconstruction vs modern-study intent confirmed
method: Cite source dimensions / reviewed reference drawing before body layout
action: Select and cite reference before any CAD body outline
